SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

Lot 7 in The Reserve at Springmill, Section Two, Hamilton County, Indiana,
described as follows:

Beginning at a point on the Easterly right of way of Springmill Court;

thence North 12 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 95.00 feet;
thence South 77 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds East, 120.00 feet;
thence South 12 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 95.00 feet;
thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 50.00 feet, an arc
length of 78.54 feet, a central angle of 90 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds,
and a chord bearing North 57 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, a chord
of 70.71 feet;
thence North 77 degrees 30 minutes 00 seconds West, 50.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
